title: 🔥 Smelting Guide
footer: Veyra • Smelting Help • Tip: Upgrade Smelter to unlock metals + reduce coal cost

pages.title: 🔥 Smelting Basics
pages.description:
Smelting converts **Ore → Bars** using **Coal** as fuel.

Command:
• `/smelt <bar_name> <amount>`
Example:
• `/smelt iron 5`

pages.title: 🧱 Smelter Level Rules
pages.description: Your **Smelter level** decides what you can smelt + coal cost.

fields.name: Bars Unlocked
fields.value:
**Lv 1:** Copper
**Lv 2-4:** Copper + Iron
**Lv 5-7:** Copper + Iron + Silver

pages.title: 📦 Getting Ores + Selling Bars
pages.description:
Smelting is great for profit and crafting.

Ores come mainly from **Miner jobs**.

fields.name: How to Get Ores
fields.value:
Use **Miner jobs** to obtain ores.
More info:
• `/details jobs`

fields.name: Selling Bars Anytime
fields.value:
Bars can always be sold to Veyra:
• `!sell <barname> <amount>`

Prices:
• Copper Bar = **50G**
• Iron Bar = **150G**
• Silver Bar = **450G**
